expectations.text: Output .pptx file exists and is valid
expectations.evidence: Line 558: outputPath = '.claude/skills/ibm-deck-workspace/iteration-1/4-slide-proposal/with_skill/outputs/digital-transformation.pptx'; Line 559: await pres.writeFile({ fileName: outputPath }). Uses pptxgenjs writeFile to generate valid PPTX.

expectations.text: Uses renderVerticalGradientBar or equivalent for left accent bars (not solid fill rectangles)
expectations.evidence: Lines 51-63: renderVerticalGradientBar function defined, creates SVG-based vertical gradient bars. Used at line 228 for challenge cards and line 467 for outcome cards: const vBar = await renderVerticalGradientBar(gradients[ch.gradientKey], 8, 260); s2.addImage({ data: vBar, ... }).

expectations.text: Uses FaArrowRight icons (not LINE shapes with endArrowType) for timeline arrows
expectations.evidence: Line 10: FaArrowRight imported from react-icons/fa. Lines 382-389: arrow rendered as icon image using iconToBase64Png(FaArrowRight, ...) and added via s3.addImage(). No LINE shapes or endArrowType found in the file.

expectations.text: Callout bar uses matching tint color from Carbon palette
expectations.evidence: Line 538: fill: { color: 'F0F5FF' } — a blue tint background for the callout bar. Line 539: line: { color: C.blue60, width: 1 } — border matches blue accent. The callout icon at line 542 also uses C.blue60. The tint color F0F5FF is a standard light-blue tint matching the Carbon blue palette.

expectations.text: Font sizes are 9pt or larger throughout
expectations.evidence: Smallest fontSize values found: 9 (line 362, duration labels), 10 (lines 159, 262, 370, 401, 487), 11 (lines 248, 552). All are >= 9pt. No font sizes below 9 found.

Lines 94-97: const cardShadow = () => ({ ... }); Lines 99-102: const footerBarShadow = () => ({ ... }). Both are arrow functions returning fresh objects. Used at lines 224, 275, 329, 461, 509 (cardShadow()) consistently.
